prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(create_orchestration_operation_request coordinator_instance_1)
(assign_resource_token_to_orchestration_operation coordinator_instance_1 resource_token_a)
(bind_task_definition_to_orchestration_operation coordinator_instance_1 task_definition_main)
(activate_orchestration_operation coordinator_instance_1 task_definition_main)
(attach_external_connector_to_orchestration_operation coordinator_instance_1 external_connector_main)
(coordinator_claim_input_channel coordinator_instance_1 input_channel_1 task_definition_main)
(coordinator_confirm_connector_and_lock coordinator_instance_1 input_channel_1 external_connector_main)
(detach_external_connector_from_orchestration_operation coordinator_instance_1 external_connector_main)
(release_task_definition coordinator_instance_1 task_definition_main)
(create_orchestration_operation_request worker_pool_1)
(assign_resource_token_to_orchestration_operation worker_pool_1 resource_token_b)
(bind_task_definition_to_orchestration_operation worker_pool_1 task_definition_main)
(activate_orchestration_operation worker_pool_1 task_definition_main)
(attach_external_connector_to_orchestration_operation worker_pool_1 external_connector_main)
(worker_pool_claim_output_channel worker_pool_1 output_channel_1 task_definition_main)
(worker_pool_confirm_connector_and_lock worker_pool_1 output_channel_1 external_connector_main)
(detach_external_connector_from_orchestration_operation worker_pool_1 external_connector_main)
(release_task_definition worker_pool_1 task_definition_main)
(compose_work_unit coordinator_instance_1 worker_pool_1 input_channel_1 output_channel_1 work_unit_1)
(bind_task_definition_to_orchestration_operation coordinator_instance_1 task_definition_main)
(lock_work_unit_for_execution work_unit_1 coordinator_instance_1 task_definition_main)
(release_task_definition coordinator_instance_1 task_definition_main)
(publish_completion_from_coordinator coordinator_instance_1 work_unit_1)
(publish_completion_from_worker_pool worker_pool_1 work_unit_1)
(create_orchestration_operation_request workflow_engine_alpha)
(assign_resource_token_to_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_alpha resource_token_c)
(bind_task_definition_to_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_alpha task_definition_main)
(activate_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_alpha task_definition_main)
(attach_credential_to_engine workflow_engine_alpha credential_admin)
(attach_external_connector_to_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_alpha external_connector_main)
(attach_package_to_workflow_engine_and_lock workflow_engine_alpha package_v1 work_unit_1)
(validate_package_on_workflow_engine_and_mark workflow_engine_alpha package_v1 work_unit_1 task_definition_main)
(apply_credential_and_prepare_workflow_engine_stage1 workflow_engine_alpha credential_admin external_connector_main package_v1 work_unit_1)
(attach_plugin_to_engine workflow_engine_alpha plugin_auth)
(attach_plugin_and_prepare_approval workflow_engine_alpha plugin_auth package_v1 work_unit_1)
(approve_and_trigger_execution workflow_engine_alpha)
(detach_external_connector_from_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_alpha external_connector_main)
(detach_credential_from_engine workflow_engine_alpha credential_admin)
(detach_plugin_from_engine workflow_engine_alpha plugin_auth)
(finalize_orchestration_operation_and_claim_lease workflow_engine_alpha lease_primary task_definition_main)
(finalize_workflow_engine_and_release_token workflow_engine_alpha resource_token_c lease_primary)
(release_task_definition workflow_engine_alpha task_definition_main)
(create_orchestration_operation_request workflow_engine_beta)
(assign_resource_token_to_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_beta resource_token_c)
(bind_task_definition_to_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_beta task_definition_main)
(activate_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_beta task_definition_main)
(attach_credential_to_engine workflow_engine_beta credential_admin)
(attach_external_connector_to_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_beta external_connector_main)
(attach_package_to_workflow_engine_and_lock workflow_engine_beta package_v2 work_unit_1)
(validate_package_on_workflow_engine_and_mark workflow_engine_beta package_v2 work_unit_1 task_definition_main)
(apply_credential_and_prepare_workflow_engine_stage1 workflow_engine_beta credential_admin external_connector_main package_v2 work_unit_1)
(attach_plugin_to_engine workflow_engine_beta plugin_auth)
(attach_plugin_and_prepare_approval workflow_engine_beta plugin_auth package_v2 work_unit_1)
(approve_and_trigger_execution workflow_engine_beta)
(detach_external_connector_from_orchestration_operation workflow_engine_beta external_connector_main)
(detach_credential_from_engine workflow_engine_beta credential_admin)
(detach_plugin_from_engine workflow_engine_beta plugin_auth)
(finalize_orchestration_operation_and_claim_lease workflow_engine_beta lease_primary task_definition_main)
(finalize_workflow_engine_and_release_token workflow_engine_beta resource_token_c lease_primary)
(release_task_definition workflow_engine_beta task_definition_main)
(bind_task_definition_to_orchestration_operation coordinator_instance_1 task_definition_main)
(finalize_orchestration_operation_and_claim_lease coordinator_instance_1 lease_primary task_definition_main)
(finalize_coordinator_and_release_token coordinator_instance_1 resource_token_a lease_primary)
(release_task_definition coordinator_instance_1 task_definition_main)
(bind_task_definition_to_orchestration_operation worker_pool_1 task_definition_main)
(finalize_orchestration_operation_and_claim_lease worker_pool_1 lease_primary task_definition_main)
(finalize_worker_pool_and_release_token worker_pool_1 resource_token_b lease_primary)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is complex, involving orchestration of long-running operations with coordinators, worker pools, workflow engines, etc. The goal is to finalize coordinator_instance_1, worker_pool_1, workflow_engine_alpha, and workflow_engine_beta.


## Examining System Components  
- The task involves managing long-running operations using coordinators, worker pools, and workflow engines.  
- Key elements include coordinator_instance_1, worker_pool_1, workflow_engine_alpha, and workflow_engine_beta.  

## Finalizing Orchestration  
- The goal is to complete the setup for coordinator_instance_1 and worker_pool_1.  
- Workflow_engine_alpha and workflow_engine_beta need to be finalized for full functionality.

## Examining System Components  
- Worker_pool_1 includes output_channel_1 for communication.  
- Work_unit_1 is allocated and shared among coordinator_1, worker_pool_1, and workflow_engines alpha and beta.  

## Finalizing Orchestration  
- Workflow_engine_alpha uses package_v1 with extension_monitoring, while workflow_engine_beta uses package_v2 with extension_tracing, though extension_tracing’s availability is unclear.  
- Both engines are bound to coordinator_1, worker_pool_1, and work_unit_1, suggesting potential parallel or sequential processing.  

## Checking Entity States  
- No entities are activated yet, and no requests have been made; all must go through request, resource claim, task binding, and activation.  
- Task_definition_main is shared, requiring release and reuse for each entity due to limited availability.  

## Planning Activation Sequence  
- The process involves creating orchestration requests, assigning resource tokens, binding tasks, and activating entities, with tokens potentially reused after finalization.  
- Finalization requires publishing completion, signaling with a lease, and releasing tokens, ensuring all four entities—coordinator_1, worker_pool_1, and workflow_engines alpha and beta—are completed.

## Exploring Entity Activation  
- Attaching data to coordinator involves populating input channels, which remain populated after finalization, ensuring data availability.  
- Finalizing inputs requires channels to be populated, claimed, and ready, supporting standard compose operations without issues.  

## Checking Compose Variants  
- Standard compose_work_unit requires coordinator inputs to be finalized, while compose_with_input_attachment needs populated but not finalized inputs.  
- Attaching and finalizing data allows standard composition but blocks attachment-specific workflows, aligning with goal requirements.  

## Processing Workflow Engines  
- Activating workflow engines involves attaching packages and locking them to work units, requiring the package to be available and the work unit composed.  
- Validation of packages on engines needs activation, package locking, and no input artifacts attached to the work unit, ensuring proper setup.

## Exploring Resource Sharing  
- Only one lease_primary is available, requiring entities to share and release it after finalization.  
- Three resource tokens exist for four entities, necessitating reuse to manage coordinator_1, worker_pool_1, and both workflow_engines.  

## Planning Entity Processing  
- Process coordinator and worker_pool first to compose and lock work_unit_1, then handle workflow_engines sequentially.  
- Both workflow_engines are bound to the same work_unit_1, requiring careful task binding and package locking.  

## Checking Workflow Paths  
- Without input artifacts, validate_package sets validated, skips policy binding, and proceeds to credential stage1, plugin attachment, and approval.  
- With input artifacts, validate_package is blocked, requiring bind_policy and apply_policy, which sets validated and policy validity, diverging the workflow path.

## Outlining Operational Steps  
- Start by creating and activating orchestration operations for coordinator_instance_1, binding task_definition_main and assigning resource_token_a.  
- Attach external_connector_main to coordinator_instance_1, claim input_channel_1, and confirm to lock, finalizing inputs and making coordinator ready.  

## Managing Resource Sharing  
- Release task_definition_main after coordinator preparation to make it available for other entities like worker_pool_1.  
- Worker_pool_1 follows a similar setup, assigning resource_token_b, binding tasks, and attaching external_connector_main, sharing resources.  

## Sequencing Entity Activation  
- Activate both workflow_engines after coordinator and worker_pool are finalized, sharing tasks and connectors to manage resource constraints.  
- Carefully sequence operations to handle shared credentials and plugins, ensuring both engines can proceed through their flows.  

## Planning Resource Allocation  
- Use one lease_primary and three resource tokens, requiring entities to share and release resources like credentials and plugins post-use.  
- Outline a plan to interleave operations, ensuring coordinator and worker_pool are composed and locked before workflow_engines execute.

## Managing Token Reuse  
- After publishing workflow_engine_alpha, rebind task_definition_main, claim lease_primary, and signal to prepare for finalization.  
- Finalize workflow_engine_alpha to release token_c and lease_primary, making them available for workflow_engine_beta, addressing the three-token limit.  

## Releasing Shared Resources  
- Detach credentials, plugins, and connectors from workflow_engine_alpha post-publication but before finalization to make them available for beta.  
- Ensure workflow_engine_beta can reuse package_v2 and other resources, skipping the extension path due to unavailability of extension_tracing.  

## Finalizing Coordinator and Worker Pool  
- Publish completions for coordinator and worker_pool after work_unit_1 is locked, then rebind tasks and claim lease for signaling.  
- Finalize coordinator and worker_pool operations to release their tokens, ensuring all entities can complete within resource constraints.

## Configuring Workflow Engine Alpha
- Assign resource_token_c and task_definition_main to workflow_engine_alpha for operation.
- Attach credential_admin, external_connector_main, package_v1, and plugin_auth to workflow_engine_alpha, preparing for execution.

## Preparing Workflow Engine Alpha
- Validate package_v1 on workflow_engine_alpha with task_definition_main, ensuring bound task conditions are met.
- Apply credentials and plugins, approve, and trigger execution, marking workflow_engine_alpha as published.

## Releasing Resources for Beta
- Detach external_connector_main, credential_admin, and plugin_auth from workflow_engine_alpha to free resources.
- Release task_definition_main after finalizing workflow_engine_alpha, making it available for workflow_engine_beta.

## Finalizing Workflow Engine Alpha
- Claim lease_primary and finalize workflow_engine_alpha, releasing resource_token_c and lease_primary for reuse.
- Ensure task_definition_main remains bound during finalization, preparing for subsequent operations.

## Setting Up Workflow Engine Beta
- Assign the now-available resource_token_c and task_definition_main to workflow_engine_beta.
- Reattach credential_admin and external_connector_main, continuing with package setup for beta operations.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
